commit_scope: Add Field Model Form v0: a Form-native field grammar spec, cross-domain domain grammars including quantum rain, lineage lenses, FMF RBasic primitive slots, native constructors for every FMF primitive across Go/Rust/TypeScript/browser kernels, a shared .fk sibling-kernel proof, a browser-local playground proof source, and a TypeScript field vertical slice proving snapshot/delta/receipt execution over DNA, chemistry, bioelectric, signaling, plant, electrical, and conversation fields. The spec explicitly marks full forward/reverse field-step semantics as TypeScript-only in this slice, not fully validated across all kernels.

local_validation.summary: Prompt guide passed in a dedicated linked worktree. Wellness completed with no blocking risks and named active-spec symbol-resolution as expected active work. TypeScript check passes after installing declared package dependencies. FMF field tests pass across seven domain examples. The shared .fk FMF band returns 93 across Go, Rust, and TypeScript kernels: 1 kernel-node proof point, 77 points for seven requested domains at 11 line items each, 4 lineage lens points, and 11 quantum-rain points. Web dependencies installed and Next build passes for the /substrate/form playground proof, with existing Next/Turbopack warnings. Python category compile, CI-mode full API tests, Go tests, and Rust cargo check pass; Rust still reports pre-existing dead-code warnings outside the reserved field primitive set. Full forward/reverse field-step semantics remain TypeScript-only in this slice.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub Actions checks.

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Local proof is complete; remote CI, PR review, and deploy verification remain pending.

multi_agent_validation.finding: Confirmed constructor coverage across supported kernels, TypeScript-only full fieldStep/reverse semantics, and no public deployment proof yet.
Proposed the 93-point score: seven domains at 11 line items each, plus kernel node, lineage, and quantum-rain proofs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form gains an executable field-grammar vertical slice: rules run against a frozen field snapshot, emit transparent deltas, commit with receipts/residuals, project back to source surfaces, and reverse an intervention by receipt.
public_endpoints: pending public verification: /substrate/form after merge and deploy
e2e_validation.public_deploy_verification: pending push, PR checks, merge, deploy, and public endpoint verification
test_flows: HBB CDS prefix lifts to a sequence field, matches start/glutamate codons, projects back exactly, mutates one base, and reverses by receipt.
Aspirin PubChem graph lifts to a molecular graph field and matches the ester subgraph.
Bioelectric, Notch/Delta, plant VOC, electrical circuit, and conversation attention examples execute field rules and write receipts.
The shared .fk proof constructs every FMF RBasic primitive category and returns 93 across Go, Rust, and TypeScript kernels.
Each requested domain contributes an 11-point structural grammar proof: carrier, match, recipe, units, schedule, conflict, scale, evidence, observer, residual, and participation.
The browser-local playground example runs the same 93-point proof locally in the browser TypeScript kernel.

validation_boundary.all_supported_kernels: FMF RBasic slot reservations, trace names, and native node constructors for every FMF primitive category.
validation_boundary.typescript_only: Full fieldStep forward execution, intervention, receipt-backed reverse, and typed domain executor validation.
validation_boundary.not_yet_validated: Full forward/reverse FMF runtime semantics in Go, Rust, and browser TypeScript.
